free_text: Isobaric analogue resonances in the 103Rh+p reactions
The Racah institute of physics.
The target was prepared by evaporation of rhodium
onto carbon backing (thickness of 20 ug/cm2). The
thickness of rhodium target was approximately
100 ug/cm2.
For neutron registration a long counter
incorporating proportional counters were used.
Silicon detector was used for proton
registration.
